<rdf:RDF 
    xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#" 
    xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#" 
    xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#" 
    xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#" 
    xmlns:onto="http://iiitb.ac.in/ontology/autonomous#">

  <!-- Classes -->
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="AcademicTitle">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents an academic title held by a person</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="FacultyMember">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents a faculty member of an institution</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Researcher">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents a researcher in a particular field</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Administrator">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents an administrator of an institution</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Institution">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents an educational institution</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Department">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents a department of an institution</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="GovernmentAgency">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents a government agency</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="HigherEducationalInstitution">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents a higher educational institution</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="ResearchCenter">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents a research center</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Publication">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents a research publication</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Award">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents an award or recognition</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <!-- Object Properties -->
  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="hasTitle">
    <rdfs:comment>Relates a person to their academic title</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#Person"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#AcademicTitle"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>

  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="isFacultyMemberOf">
    <rdfs:comment>Relates a person to the institution they are a faculty member of</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#Person"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#Institution"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>

  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="hasResearchInterest">
    <rdfs:comment>Relates a person to their research interests</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#Person"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#ResearchField"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>

  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="heads">
    <rdfs:comment>Relates a person to the research center they head</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#Person"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#ResearchCenter"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>

  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="servesOn">
    <rdfs:comment>Relates a person to the advisory panel they serve on</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#Person"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#GovernmentAgency"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>

  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="isMemberOf">
    <rdfs:comment>Relates a person to the board they are a member of</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#Person"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#Board"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>

  <!-- Datatype Properties -->
  <owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:ID="hasEmail">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents an email address</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#Person"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="xsd:string"/>
  </owl:DatatypeProperty>

  <owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:ID="hasBiography">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents a person's biography</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#Person"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="xsd:string"/>
  </owl:DatatypeProperty>

  <!-- Individuals -->
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="ChandrashekarRamanathan">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Person"/>
    <onto:hasTitle rdf:resource="#TSAPI"/>
    <onto:isFacultyMemberOf rdf:resource="#IIITB"/>
    <onto:hasResearchInterest rdf:resource="#DataScience"/>
    <onto:hasResearchInterest rdf:resource="#SoftwareEngineering"/>
    <onto:hasResearchInterest rdf:resource="#LargeScaleApplicationDevelopment"/>
    <onto:heads rdf:resource="#MINRO"/>
    <onto:heads rdf:resource="#CTRI-DG"/>
    <onto:servesOn rdf:resource="#DepartmentOfEducation"/>
    <onto:servesOn rdf:resource="#DepartmentOfFinance"/>
    <onto:servesOn rdf:resource="#CenterForSmartGovernance"/>
    <onto:isMemberOf rdf:resource="#BoardOfStudies"/>
    <onto:hasEmail rdf:datatype="xsd:string">rc@iiitb.ac.in</onto:hasEmail>
    <onto:hasBiography rdf:datatype="xsd:string">Professor Chandrashekar Ramanathan is a faculty member at IIIT-B (International Institute of Information Technology Bangalore) since 2007 serving as professor, researcher and administrator. He has been working in the field of Computing for over 25 years in various capacities across industry and academia. He has been associated with IIITB for over 15 years where he has been teaching and carrying out research in diverse areas. His expertise lies in the fields of data science, software engineering, and large scale application development. He holds a Ph.D. degree from Mississippi State University, with his research focused on object-oriented databases. His teaching interests are in the areas of data modeling, data analytics, database design, and software architecture. His current research focus is Data Science, Model-based Software Engineering, and Technology for Education. He has authored several research papers and supervised thesis work of four PhD students, who have now graduated from IIIT-B under his guidance. He is currently heading Machine Intelligence and Robotics Center (MINRO) and Center for Technology Research and Innovation – Digital Governance (CTRI-DG), both of which are funded by Government of Karnataka. He is passionate about the use of technology for improving the quality of education. He serves on the Technical Advisory Panels of many departments of the Government of Karnataka including the Department of Education, Finance, and Center for Smart Governance. He also serves as a subject-matter expert on the Board of Studies of several HEI (Higher Educational Institutions). Dr. Chandrashekar was a Board member in the “Board for IT Education Standards (BITES)” between 2013 and 2023. He was recognized in the list of “Top 10 Data Science academicians of India” by the Analytics India magazine for the year 2018 and again in 2019.</onto:hasBiography>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="IIITB">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Institution"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="MINRO">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#ResearchCenter"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="CTRI-DG">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#ResearchCenter"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="DepartmentOfEducation">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#GovernmentAgency"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="DepartmentOfFinance">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#GovernmentAgency"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="CenterForSmartGovernance">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#GovernmentAgency"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="BoardOfStudies">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Board"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="TSAPI">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#AcademicTitle"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="DataScience">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#ResearchField"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="SoftwareEngineering">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#ResearchField"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="LargeScaleApplicationDevelopment">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#ResearchField"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

</rdf:RDF>
